entries.en-US: > This file extends [common/security.md](../common/security.md) with web-specific security content.
entries.zh-Hans: > 此文件在 [common/security.md](../common/security.md) 的基础上扩展了特定于 Web 的安全内容。
始终为生产环境配置 CSP。

entries.en-US: Use a per-request nonce for scripts instead of `'unsafe-inline'`.
entries.zh-Hans: 对脚本使用每次请求唯一的 nonce，而不是 `'unsafe-inline'`。

entries.en-US: Adjust origins to the project. Do not cargo-cult this block unchanged.
entries.zh-Hans: 根据项目调整来源。不要原封不动地照搬此代码块。

entries.en-US:
- Never inject unsanitized HTML
- Avoid `innerHTML` / `dangerouslySetInnerHTML` unless sanitized first
- Escape dynamic template values
- Sanitize user HTML with a vetted local sanitizer when absolutely necessary
entries.zh-Hans:
* 切勿注入未经净化的 HTML
* 避免使用 `innerHTML` / `dangerouslySetInnerHTML`，除非事先进行了净化
* 对动态模板值进行转义
* 在绝对必要时，使用经过验证的本地净化器对用户 HTML 进行净化

entries.en-US:
- Load asynchronously
- Use SRI when serving from a CDN
- Audit quarterly
- Prefer self-hosting for critical dependencies when practical
entries.zh-Hans:
* 异步加载
* 从 CDN 提供服务时使用 SRI
* 每季度进行审计
* 在可行的情况下，对关键依赖项优先选择自托管

entries.en-US:
```text
Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains; preload
X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff
X-Frame-Options: DENY
Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin
Permissions-Policy: camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=()
```
entries.zh-Hans:
```text
Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains; preload
X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff
X-Frame-Options: DENY
Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin
Permissions-Policy: camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=()
```

entries.en-US:
- CSRF protection on state-changing forms
- Rate limiting on submission endpoints
- Validate client and server side
- Prefer honeypots or light anti-abuse controls over heavy-handed CAPTCHA defaults
entries.zh-Hans:
* 对状态变更的表单实施 CSRF 防护
* 在提交端点实施速率限制
* 在客户端和服务器端都进行验证
* 优先选择蜜罐或轻量级的防滥用控制，而非默认的重度验证码
